title: ilex discolor var. lamprophylla
intro: Ilex discolor var. lamprophylla, also known as the Japanese holly or 'Holly of the Mountains', is a deciduous shrub native to Japan and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex discolor var. lamprophylla include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and improve digestion, as well as its ability to support immune function and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and decoctions to treat various health conditions.
